title: Behind Big Oil’s first-quarter beat: The quiet rise of trading desks
summary: Europe's oil supermajors highlighted trading contributions as they reported stronger-than-expected profits through the first three months of the year.

title: The No.1 Rare Earth Stock for 2026?
summary: Roughly 40 years ago, the United States made a decision that seemed perfectly rational at the time: it stopped processing rare earths. The economics didn’t make sense when China could do it cheaper, so U.S. facilities closed…the expertise scattered…and an entire layer of industrial capability mostl…
